name: Veal Stroganoff Stew
recipeInstructions:
1. In a plastic bag or shallow pan, mix together flour, salt, ground mace, and pepper.
2. Coat the veal cubes with the flour mixture.
3. Heat oil in a slow cooker or skillet over medium heat.
4. Add veal cubes and brown them.
5. Transfer to the heating unit or slow cooker.
6. Add all remaining ingredients except sour cream to the slow cooker.
7. Stir to combine. Cover and cook on setting #3 (low) for 7-9 hours, or on high (setting #5) for 3-4 hours until meat and vegetables are tender.
8. Just before serving, stir in sour cream.
